expositionText: I've been planning something. A venture into the wilds. But I need supplies first, and I can't leave the settlement.
acceptText: Excellent. Gather {gather_count} {quest_item} for me. I'll prepare the rest.
declineText: Hmph. I'll find someone with more nerve, then.
skillcheckPassText: You look capable enough. I'll throw in a little extra for your trouble.
skillcheckFailText: You don't look like much, but beggars can't be choosers.
expositionTurnInText: Perfect. These will do nicely. The venture can begin.
conflict1Text: There's a problem. {enemy_type_plural} have set up camp near our route. Clear out {gather_count} of them so we can pass safely.
conflict1TurnInText: The path is clear. Good work.
conflict2Text: One last complication. {target_npc} has information about an alternate route. Go speak with them.
conflict2TurnInText: An alternate route. Clever. This changes everything.
resolutionText: The venture is a success, thanks to you. Here, you've earned this and more.
